seeed_rpcwifimanager_create.tooltip: Create a Seeed RPC WiFiManager object for automatic connection and configuration portal flows.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_auto_connect.message0: WiFiManager %1 auto connect config AP %2 password %3
seeed_rpcwifimanager_auto_connect.tooltip: Try saved WiFi credentials first; start the named configuration portal if connection fails.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_auto_connect_defaul.message0: WiFiManager %1 auto connect default config AP
seeed_rpcwifimanager_auto_connect_defaul.tooltip: Try saved WiFi credentials first; use a device-ID based default portal name if connection fails.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_start_portal.message0: WiFiManager %1 start config portal AP %2 password %3
seeed_rpcwifimanager_start_portal.tooltip: Start the configuration portal directly without trying saved WiFi first.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_start_portal_defaul.tooltip: Start the configuration portal with the default device-ID based AP name.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_reset_settings.tooltip: Clear WiFi settings saved by WiFiManager.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_portal_timeout.message0: WiFiManager %1 set config portal timeout %2 seconds
seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_portal_timeout.tooltip: Set how long the configuration portal waits for user input.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_connect_timeout.tooltip: Set how long WiFiManager waits while trying to connect to WiFi.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_debug_output.tooltip: Enable or disable WiFiManager Serial debug output.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_min_quality.tooltip: Filter WiFi networks below this signal quality from the configuration page.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_remove_duplicat.tooltip: Choose whether duplicate SSIDs are hidden in the scan list.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_break_after_sav.tooltip: Exit the configuration portal after saving settings even if connection fails.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_ap_static_ip.message0: WiFiManager %1 set portal IP %2 gateway %3 subnet %4
seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_ap_static_ip.tooltip: Set static IP, gateway, and subnet for the configuration portal AP mode.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_sta_static_ip.message0: WiFiManager %1 set connected IP %2 gateway %3 subnet %4
seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_sta_static_ip.tooltip: Set static IP, gateway, and subnet after connecting to the target WiFi.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_set_custom_head.tooltip: Inject custom HTML, CSS, or script content into the configuration portal page head.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_get_portal_ssid.tooltip: Get the current configuration portal hotspot name.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_get_ssid.tooltip: Read the currently saved or newly submitted SSID.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_get_password.tooltip: Read the currently saved or newly submitted WiFi password.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_parameter_create.message0: create WiFiManager parameter %1 ID %2 label %3 default %4 length %5
seeed_rpcwifimanager_parameter_create.tooltip: Create a custom input parameter that can be added to the configuration portal form.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_parameter_create_ht.tooltip: Create a configuration portal parameter that only inserts custom HTML.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_add_parameter.tooltip: Add a custom parameter to the WiFiManager configuration portal form.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_parameter_value.tooltip: Read the submitted custom parameter value after the portal finishes.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_parameter_placehold.tooltip: Read the label displayed for the custom parameter.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_parameter_length.tooltip: Read the maximum stored length for the custom parameter.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_on_portal_start.tooltip: Register a callback that runs when AP configuration portal mode starts.

seeed_rpcwifimanager_on_save_success.message0: when WiFiManager %1 saves config and connects
seeed_rpcwifimanager_on_save_success.tooltip: Register a callback that runs after custom settings are saved and WiFi connects.
